title: Skynara

'''Skynara''' was an astronomical object<ref name="GG9" /> located in the [[Skynara system/Legends|Skynara system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Skine sector/Legends|Skine sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated at the endpoint of the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Five Veils Route]].<ref name="GG9" />

The [[Realspace/Legends|space]] surrounding Skynara was [[Scout/Legends|explored]] at some point between [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] and [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Luxury yacht/Legends|luxury yacht]] ''[[Veil of Skynara]]'', which carried the famous and valuable [[Balved Sculpture]] of the [[Veil of Skynara (sculpture)|same name]] aboard, ran cruises and shorter trips along the Five Veils Route.<ref name="GG9" />

The population of the Skynara [[Star system/Legends|system]] around [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] numbered between 1 million and 10 million. By [[137 ABY]], Skynara, which had been incorporated into the territory controlled by [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]], also lay within the area of influence of the [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]], a faction formed from the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Core Fleet|forces]] that had refused to surrender to the [[Fel Empire]] at the end of the [[Sith–Imperial War]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Skynara was first mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a [[1993]] sourcebook written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG9" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Skynara system, and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square P-19.<ref name="TEA" />
